author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic/manual relation cleanup prep; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, durable retirements, replacement submissions, LOG edits, manifest edits, canonical/generated edits, or code edits applied

checkpoint_context.not_repeated: This prep selects a remaining singleton and does not repeat relation037 through relation052.

bucket.name: GCT-Albany Amtrak cause modeled as related_route project self-edge
bucket.cleanup_direction: retire-only data cleanup; keep related_route scoped to route -> route
bucket.rationale: The submitted relation points the Grand Central Terminal to Albany roundtrip train service project at itself using related_route. Current related_route requires route endpoints, and the source-backed causal statement is already preserved in the accepted project record description.

replacement_absent_or_not_needed.reason: A replacement would either preserve the same self-edge, invent a cross-source link to a separate East River Tunnel project record, or use an unshaped generic relation. None is necessary for endpoint cleanup because the accepted project observation already carries the Amtrak East River Tunnel causal text from the same evidence block.

local_observation_ids_not_colliding.reason: No replacement local_observation_id is proposed for this retire-only batch.

current_related_route_project_to_project.endpoint_shape_issue: Relation kind related_route expects route -> route, got project -> project.

evidence_supports_retire_only_semantics.summary: The block states that Metro-North will operate a Grand Central Terminal to Albany roundtrip train, that it results from Amtrak East River Tunnel project capacity loss, and that the service extends an existing Hudson Line Poughkeepsie train. It supports the project record but not a route-to-route related_route relation, and not a project self-relation.

existing_semantic_coverage.summary: Accepted project record already says the service is a result of loss of capacity from Amtrak's East River Tunnel project and that it extends an existing Hudson Line Poughkeepsie train.

no_generated_files_edited.note: The shared worktree already contains generated-output and other edits owned by others. This task writes only data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch053-prep.json and does not edit retired.json, submissions, canonical JSONL, materialized data, wiki output, LOG, manifest, code, or generated files.

The cited block supports the accepted Grand Central Terminal to Albany roundtrip project description, including the Amtrak East River Tunnel capacity-loss cause, but does not support a route-to-route relation or a project self-edge.

original.reason: The relation uses related_route with project endpoints and points the project at itself; the source-backed causal context is already retained on the project record.
